pageSubtitle: Configure your priorities for timetable generation

presets.title: Choose Your School's Priority
presets.subtitle: Select a preset or create custom settings

teacher.title: Teacher-Focused
teacher.details: Prioritizes teacher comfort: minimal gaps, balanced workload, respects time preferences

class.title: Class-Focused
class.details: Prioritizes student learning: difficult subjects in morning, no gaps, good subject spread

balanced.title: Balanced
balanced.details: Good balance between teacher and student needs - recommended for most schools

fast.title: Fast
fast.details: Minimal constraints for quick generation - suitable for schools with 150+ requests

custom.title: Custom
custom.details: Arrange priorities by dragging and dropping

ranking.title: Priority Order
ranking.subtitle: Drag constraints to reorder - higher = more important

small.title: All constraints will be applied
small.description: With {{classCount}} classes and {{subjectCount}} subjects, all your settings will be applied to timetable generation.

medium.title: Some constraints may be ignored
medium.description: With {{classCount}} classes and {{subjectCount}} subjects, low-priority constraints may be ignored for faster generation.

large.title: Only critical constraints will be applied
large.description: With {{classCount}} classes and {{subjectCount}} subjects, 'Fast' preset is recommended. Only critical constraints will be applied.

categories.teacherDesc: Settings related to teacher comfort and preferences
categories.subject: Subject Constraints
categories.subjectDesc: Settings related to subject distribution and timing

avoidTeacherGaps.label: Avoid Teacher Gaps
avoidTeacherGaps.tooltip: If enabled: Math teacher has periods 1, 2, 3. If disabled: May have periods 1 and 5.

balanceTeacherLoad.label: Balance Teacher Load
balanceTeacherLoad.tooltip: Teachers have similar number of periods each day, not one busy day and one empty.

respectTeacherTimePreference.label: Respect Teacher Time Preference
respectTeacherTimePreference.tooltip: If a teacher prefers morning, their lessons are scheduled in the first half of the day.

respectTeacherRoomPreference.label: Respect Teacher Room Preference
respectTeacherRoomPreference.tooltip: Teachers teach in rooms they have indicated as preferred.

avoidClassGaps.label: Avoid Class Gaps
avoidClassGaps.tooltip: Classes have no breaks between lessons - students don't wait around.

distributeDifficultSubjects.label: Distribute Difficult Subjects
distributeDifficultSubjects.tooltip: Math and Physics not on the same day - students don't get overwhelmed.

preferMorningForDifficult.label: Difficult Subjects in Morning
preferMorningForDifficult.tooltip: Math and Science in first periods when students have better concentration.

subjectSpread.label: Subject Spread
subjectSpread.tooltip: Math on Saturday, Monday, Wednesday - not three consecutive days.

allowConsecutivePeriods.label: Allow Consecutive Periods
allowConsecutivePeriods.description: Same subject can have back-to-back periods
allowConsecutivePeriods.tooltip: If enabled: Math can be periods 1 and 2. If disabled: Must have a gap.

minimizeRoomChanges.label: Minimize Room Changes
minimizeRoomChanges.tooltip: Students stay in one room - less movement between classes.

avoidFirstLastPeriod.label: Avoid First/Last Period
avoidFirstLastPeriod.description: Lessons in middle periods of day
avoidFirstLastPeriod.tooltip: First and last periods left empty - for assemblies or other activities.
